title: Line 31210 – PPIP premiums payable on employment income - Canada.ca
content:
## Line 31210 – PPIP premiums payable on employment income
If you were a resident of Quebec on December 31 , 2025, claim, in dollars and cents, the amount from line 17 of Schedule 10, Employment Insurance (EI) and Provincial Parental Insurance Plan (PPIP) Premiums , if both of the following apply:
- Your employment income (including from outside Canada) is $2,000 or more
- One of your T4 slips has a province of employment other than Quebec in box 10
The maximum amount that you can claim is $484.12.

## Forms and publications
- Schedule 10, Employment Insurance (EI) and Provincial Parental Insurance Plan (PPIP) Premiums
- Québec Parental Insurance Plan
